Now, begin your planning analysis for this task!

[PLAN]:
## Goal 1: Explore the Sinomach Homepage for Navigation to News/Announcements
- Path 1.1: Crawl the homepage at https://www.sinomach.com.cn/  
  - Extract all visible links, especially those referencing “新闻”, “媒体中心”, “公告”, or “项目”  
  - Success: Obtain direct URLs for news listing pages or press release archives  
- Path 1.2: Search within the site using built-in search (if present)  
  - Use crawl_page to locate any search bar on the homepage and query “2023年7月27日 启动”  
  - Success: Get a list of internal search results that point to relevant pages  

## Goal 2: Search the Web Specifically for the Project Launch on July 27, 2023
- Path 2.1: Use web_search with query “site:sinomach.com.cn 2023年7月27日 启动”  
  - Success: Retrieve search results directly from the Sinomach domain mentioning that date and “启动”  
- Path 2.2: Use web_search with query “国机集团 2023年7月27日 项目启动”  
  - Success: Obtain broader results (news articles, press releases) that may link to a Sinomach page or official announcement  

## Goal 3: Analyze Identified Pages to Pinpoint the Exact Project Name
- Path 3.1: Crawl the most relevant result (e.g., from Goal 2) and extract text around “2023年7月27日” to identify the project name  
  - Use specific extraction query: “2023年7月27日 启动 项目”  
  - Success: Find a sentence like “国机集团承担的XX项目于2023年7月27日正式启动”  
- Path 3.2: If multiple candidates exist, crawl additional linked pages (e.g., from “媒体中心” list) and cross‑reference the date  
  - Success: Confirm the exact project name and ensure it matches the launch date  

All goals can be executed in parallel; paths within each goal are sequential. The final answer will be extracted once any path in Goal 3 succeeds.
